						<h1 class="fw-medium">Goldman Sachs Raises Copper Price Forecasts for 2026 and 2027</h1>
						<p><a href="https://app.indexbox.io/companies/profile/5681228/" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow">Goldman Sachs</a> has revised upward its <a href="https://app.indexbox.io/indicators/symbol/copper-dec-25/" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow">copper</a> price projections for 2026 and 2027, as reported by Scrap Monster. The revision stems from expectations that reduced output growth in key <a href="https://www.indexbox.io/store/u-s-copper-ores-and-concentrates-market-analysis-forecast-size-trends-and-insights-1/" target="_blank">copper</a>-producing areas will constrain worldwide metal supply.</p><p>The bank points to a notably tighter global market beyond the U.S., fueled by diminished mine supply growth and unexpectedly high American imports. The end-2026 <a href="https://app.indexbox.io/indicators/symbol/copper-dec-25/" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow">copper price</a> estimate was lifted to $13,735 per metric ton from a prior $12,465. The 2027 average forecast was also increased to $13,800 per ton, compared with an earlier $12,150.</p><p>Goldman Sachs now anticipates supply shortfalls outside the U.S. of about 640,000 tons in 2026 and 170,000 tons in 2027, both markedly above prior estimates. Combined production from the Grasberg Mine in Indonesia and the Kamoa-Kakula Mine is projected to fall by roughly 200,000 tons relative to earlier expectations.</p><p>The bank foresees copper prices staying near current levels of approximately $13,600 per ton over the near term, then rising above $14,000 per ton in the latter half of 2026.</p><div class="kmp-panel" id="kmp-panel">

						<p class="fs-5">This report provides a comprehensive view of the copper ore industry in the United States, tracking demand, supply, and trade flows across the national value chain. It explains how demand across key channels and end-use segments shapes consumption patterns, while also mapping the role of input availability, production efficiency, and regulatory standards on supply.</p>
<p class="fs-5">Beyond headline metrics, the study benchmarks prices, margins, and trade routes so you can see where value is created and how it moves between domestic suppliers and international partners. The analysis is designed to support strategic planning, market entry, portfolio prioritization, and risk management in the copper ore landscape in the United States.</p><h2 class="fw-medium ib-fs-36" id="overview">Quick navigation</h2>
<ul>
  <li class="fs-5"><a href="#key-findings">Key findings</a></li>
  <li class="fs-5"><a href="#report-scope">Report scope</a></li>

  <li class="fs-5"><a href="#faq">FAQ</a></li>
</ul><h2 class="fw-medium ib-fs-36" id="key-findings">Key findings</h2>
<ul>
  <li class="fs-5">Domestic demand is shaped by both household and industrial usage, with trade flows linking local supply to imports and exports.</li>
  <li class="fs-5">Pricing dynamics reflect unit values, freight costs, exchange rates, and regulatory shifts that affect sourcing decisions.</li>
  <li class="fs-5">Supply depends on input availability and production efficiency, creating a distinct national cost curve.</li>
  <li class="fs-5">Market concentration varies by segment, creating different competitive landscapes and entry barriers.</li>
  <li class="fs-5">The 2035 outlook highlights where capacity investment and demand growth are most aligned within the country.</li>
</ul><h2 class="fw-medium ib-fs-36" id="report-scope">Report scope</h2>
<p class="fs-5">The report combines market sizing with trade intelligence and price analytics for the United States. It covers both historical performance and the forward outlook to 2035, allowing you to compare cycles, structural shifts, and policy impacts.</p>
<ul>
  <li class="fs-5">Market size and growth in value and volume terms</li>
  <li class="fs-5">Consumption structure by end-use segments</li>
  <li class="fs-5">Production capacity, output, and cost dynamics</li>
  <li class="fs-5">Trade flows, exporters, importers, and balances</li>
  <li class="fs-5">Price benchmarks, unit values, and margin signals</li>
  <li class="fs-5">Competitive context and market entry conditions</li>
</ul><h2 class="fw-medium ib-fs-36" id="product-coverage">Product coverage</h2><ul><li class="fs-5">Prodcom 07291100 - Copper ores and concentrates</li></ul><h2 class="fw-medium ib-fs-36" id="country-coverage">Country coverage</h2><ul style="columns: 2; column-gap: 2rem;"><li class="fs-5">United States</li></ul><h2 class="fw-medium ib-fs-36" id="country-profiles">Country profile and benchmarks</h2>
<p class="fs-5">This report provides a consistent view of market size, trade balance, prices, and per-capita indicators for the United States. The profile highlights demand structure and trade position, enabling benchmarking against regional and global peers.</p><h2 class="fw-medium ib-fs-36" id="methodology">Methodology</h2>
<p class="fs-5">The analysis is built on a multi-source framework that combines official statistics, trade records, company disclosures, and expert validation. Data are standardized, reconciled, and cross-checked to ensure consistency across time series.</p>

	(function () {
		function initKeyParticipantsTable() {
			if (!custom_report_v2 || !Array.isArray(store_companies_data) || !store_companies_data.length) {
				return;
			}
			const table = document.getElementById('kmp-table');
			const search = document.getElementById('kmp-search');
			const sort = document.getElementById('kmp-sort');
			if (!table || !search || !sort) {
				return;
			}
			const tbody = table.querySelector('tbody');
			if (!tbody) {
				return;
			}

			const normalize = (v) => String(v || '').toLowerCase();
			const escapeHtml = (value) => String(value || '')
				.replace(/&/g, '&')
				.replace(/</g, '<')
				.replace(/>/g, '>')
				.replace(/"/g, '"')
				.replace(/'/g, ''');
			const renderRows = (rows) => {
				tbody.innerHTML = rows.map((item) => (
					'<tr>'
					+ '<td>' + (parseInt(item.rank, 10) || 0) + '</td>'
					+ '<td>' + escapeHtml(item.name || '') + '</td>'
					+ '<td>' + escapeHtml(item.headquarters || '') + '</td>'
					+ '<td>' + escapeHtml(item.focus || '') + '</td>'
					+ '<td>' + escapeHtml(item.scale || '') + '</td>'
					+ '<td>' + escapeHtml(item.note || '') + '</td>'
					+ '</tr>'
				)).join('');
			};

			const apply = () => {
				const q = normalize(search.value).trim();
				const sortBy = sort.value || 'rank';
				let rows = store_companies_data.slice();
				if (q) {
					rows = rows.filter((item) => {
						const bucket = [
							item.name,
							item.headquarters,
							item.focus,
							item.scale,
							item.note
						].map(normalize).join(' | ');
						return bucket.includes(q);
					});
				}
				rows.sort((a, b) => {
					if (sortBy === 'name') {
						return String(a.name || '').localeCompare(String(b.name || ''));
					}
					if (sortBy === 'hq') {
						return String(a.headquarters || '').localeCompare(String(b.headquarters || ''));
					}
					return (parseInt(a.rank, 10) || 0) - (parseInt(b.rank, 10) || 0);
				});
				renderRows(rows);
			};

			search.addEventListener('input', apply);
			sort.addEventListener('change', apply);
			apply();
		}

			function syncStoreTabs() {
				if (!custom_report_v2 || !store_tabs_sync_enabled || !store_report_url) {
					return;
				}
				const paneMap = [
					'descr-tab-pane',
					'toc-tab-pane',
					'news-tab-pane',
					'companies-tab-pane',
					'review-tab-pane',
					'dashboard-tab-pane',
					'macro-indicators-tab-pane'
				];
				const selectorTokens = [
					'.dashboard-demo',
					'.dashboard-subtabs',
					'.dashboard-insights-tabs',
					'.macro-indicators',
					'.news-grid',
					'.news-card',
					'.companies-grid',
					'.g2-section',
					'.g2-review-card'
				];
				const syncStylesFromStore = (doc) => {
					const styleBlocks = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('style'))
						.map((node) => node.textContent || '')
						.filter((css) => selectorTokens.some((token) => css.indexOf(token) !== -1));
					if (!styleBlocks.length) {
						return;
					}
					let styleNode = document.getElementById('store-sync-inline-styles');
					if (!styleNode) {
						styleNode = document.createElement('style');
						styleNode.id = 'store-sync-inline-styles';
						document.head.appendChild(styleNode);
					}
					styleNode.textContent = styleBlocks.join('\n\n');
				};
				const syncPaneContent = (src, dst) => {
					const currentClass = dst.getAttribute('class') || '';
					Array.from(dst.attributes).forEach((attr) => {
						if (attr.name === 'id' || attr.name === 'class') return;
						dst.removeAttribute(attr.name);
					});
					Array.from(src.attributes).forEach((attr) => {
						if (attr.name === 'id' || attr.name === 'class') return;
						dst.setAttribute(attr.name, attr.value);
					});
					dst.setAttribute('class', currentClass);
					dst.innerHTML = src.innerHTML;
				};
				const setError = (message) => {
					paneMap.forEach((id) => {
						const pane = document.getElementById(id);
						if (!pane) return;
					const loader = pane.querySelector('[data-store-sync-loading]');
					if (loader) {
						loader.textContent = message;
					}
				});
			};

			fetch(store_report_url, { credentials: 'same-origin' })
				.then((resp) => {
					if (!resp.ok) {
						throw new Error('Store sync request failed');
					}
					return resp.text();
				})
					.then((html) => {
						const parser = new DOMParser();
						const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
						syncStylesFromStore(doc);
							paneMap.forEach((id) => {
								const src = doc.getElementById(id);
								const dst = document.getElementById(id);
								if (!dst || !src) return;
								syncPaneContent(src, dst);
							});
						if (typeof window.isLocalHost === 'undefined') {
							window.isLocalHost = (
								window.location.hostname === 'localhost'
								|| window.location.hostname === '127.0.0.1'
							);
						}

						const scripts = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('script:not([src])'));
						scripts.forEach((scriptNode) => {
						const text = scriptNode.textContent || '';
						if (
							text.indexOf('dashboard-tab-pane') === -1 &&
							text.indexOf('macro-indicators') === -1 &&
							text.indexOf('companies-tab-pane') === -1
						) {
							return;
						}
						const script = document.createElement('script');
						script.text = text;
						document.body.appendChild(script);
					});
				})
				.catch(() => {
					setError('Unable to sync tab content from Store report. Please open the report link directly.');
				});
		}

		document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
			initKeyParticipantsTable();
			syncStoreTabs();
		});
	})();
</script>
